options.text:
Schoolyear advice - Important:

It is essential that you select the Subscription you previously used for the Schoolyear AVD installation, failing to do so will result in a failed upgrade.

elements.name: acknowledgeRisk
elements.label: I confirm that I have selected the correct subscription used for the initial Schoolyear AVD installation

constraints.validationMessage: You must acknowledge that you have selected the correct subscription before proceeding.

elements.name: appServicePlanName
elements.label: App Service Plan name
elements.toolTip: The name for the App Service Plan that will host the Function App.

constraints.validationMessage: Must be 1-40 characters: alphanumerics and hyphens. Start and end with alphanumeric.

elements.name: functionAppName
elements.label: Function App name
elements.toolTip: The name for the Function App. This must be globally unique across Azure.

constraints.validationMessage: Must be 2-60 characters: lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens. Start and end with lowercase letter or number.

infoMessages.text: This name must be globally unique across all of Azure

elements.name: vmLoginCustomRoleName
elements.label: VM login custom role name
elements.toolTip: This is a custom role that allows users to login and use AVD virtual machines. Will be used by Schoolyear to grant individual access to sessionhosts. You can change the default name of the role here.

constraints.validationMessage: Must be 3-64 letters, numbers, and hyphens. Start and end with letter or number. Can't use consecutive hyphens.

options.text: A storage account will be created to store student exam session backup files. Files are stored under the path `examID/workspaceID/deviceID` and are automatically deleted after 30 days.

constraints.validationMessage: Please enter a valid Storage Account name. The name must be 3-24 characters long, and may contain only lowercase letters and numbers.

infoMessages.text: This name must be globally unique, across all of Azure

elements.name: backupStorageContainerName
elements.label: Backup container name
elements.toolTip: The name of the blob container that will hold backup files. You can change the default name here.

constraints.validationMessage: Must be 3-63 lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens. Start and end with letter or number. Can't use consecutive hyphens.

options.text: A storage account will be created for the Function App's runtime storage and deployment package.

constraints.validationMessage: Please enter a valid Storage Account name. The name must be 3-24 characters long, and may contain only lowercase letters and numbers.

infoMessages.text: This name must be globally unique, across all of Azure

elements.name: functionAppStorageContainerName
elements.label: Function App deployment package container name
elements.toolTip: The name of the blob container that will hold the Function App's deployment package. You can change the default name here.

constraints.validationMessage: Must be 3-63 lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens. Start and end with letter or number. Can't use consecutive hyphens.

elements.name: functionAppPackageDeployIdentityName
elements.label: Function App package deploy identity name
elements.toolTip: A managed identity used to deploy the Function App's code package during installation and updates. You can change the default name of the resource here.

constraints.validationMessage: Please enter a valid Managed Identity name. The name must be 3-128 characters long, and may contain alphanumerics, hyphens, and underscores. Start with a letter or number.
